ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: del Cavalier Gio. Battista Bertanni Tragedia rappresentata in Padova per gli Accademici Disuniti l`anno 1642. Alla presenza dell`Illustriss. et Eccellentiss. Sig. capitano Giorgio Contarini et allo stesso dedicata.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Printer`s name has been erased. According to Maylender, Giulio Crivellari is the printer.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
